name: Draconic Toxin Bottle
description:
This glass bottle appears to be a dragon's breath potion of a specific dragon type (usually red) but has been polluted, making it toxic to use.

Activate (1 Action) Interact

Effect You drink from the bottle and must succeed at a DC 25 Fortitude check saving throw or become Sickened 1 (Sickened 2 on a critical failure) and immediately vomit the potion directly onto yourself, taking damage as though you had failed a save against a standard dragon's breath potion. If you succeed at your Fortitude save, you become sickened 1 but otherwise are able to unleash a breath weapon as normal for a dragon's breath potion of the appropriate type.
